['App crashed during first two attempts. Rough month for his family in terms of colds and stomach viruses. Patient reports some congestion. Patient made a total of 5 attempts.', 'Could not complete session due major technical difficulties with connection. Patient and RA were able to connect once with one unsuccessful breathing test before connection was lost. The patient could not return to another invite as her app started scanning for her spirometer device.  After scanning for an extended amount of time with no success, the patient rebooted her phone and tried again ending with the same results in the device could not be found. After 30 minutes of trying to connect, RA decided to end session and reach out to Zephyrx to address the issue.', "Due to the patient's progressing ALS,", 'Efforts 2 and 3 were accepted by this coordinator the curves and data were no different then effort one which met the ATS acceptabiltiy.', 'For efforsts 1-3 the patient had a good seal and blew out for as long and as hard as he could and the curves look great so I am accepting these efforts.', 'For efforts 1 & 2 it said for patient to exhale longer I have accepted these efforts due to the curves looking good and he blew out as long as he could.', 'For efforts 3 - 5 the patient was seated and completed the effort exactly the same as effort one and two and the curves looked good so therefore I am accepting them as valid ATS efforts.', 'For efforts 3 and 4 the patient did exactly the same thing as efforts 1 and 2. He had a good seal and followed my commands. The curves looked great so I have accepted them as valid efforts.', 'For the first effort the patient let out some air before placing device into his mouth so this effort was rejected.', 'Good', 'Good session.', 'Good trials.', 'Great!  Multiple a', 'I accepted efforts  2-4 the patient exhaled faster for effort 4 and based of the curve it was same time as the other efforts. For efforts 2 and 3 he still had good values and curves and his % predicted was consistant at 91% so I have accepted these two efforts.', 'I accepted these efforts the patient blew out as fast and as long has he could he didnt have any more air left to blow out. We lost connection with Patient so we are starting another session.', 'I forgot to hit reject for the first effort the pt accidently blew out some air and then breathed back in so the device detected that and had a weird curve. Please reject effort 1.', 'I have had the same issue with my patients lately the ATS is not accepting the efforsts and saying patient needs to exhale longer or effort endded abrubtly but the curves look good and the variability is within range. The patients are blowing out as long as they can and doing everything correctly.', 'N/D', 'No significant symptoms, just weakness', 'On effort three, the graph did not show up when the patient was completing the maneuver, but the graph and effort populated after, so we accepted the effort.', 'Patient blew out for as long as he can and did everything very well so I am accepting these tests as valid.', "Patient confirms she will be on vacation from August 12-27. Patient Texts @ 11:31 post aural anallytics speech task questions - She notes her saliva prodcution increases after taking the Tiglituk for about an hour and takes atropine sulphate drops to address the issue as prescribed by Dr. Harms. However, she states eating food was like 'eating sand' when she took the drops three hours before dinner. She notes she stopped taking the drops as the saliva increase is not a big issue.", 'Patient did everything he could he was breathing out as long as he could and then taking the breath in curves looked good but keeps saying session ended abrubtly.
